name: ElmSyntaxPrint

values.name: comments
values.comment:
Print `--` or `{- -}` comments placed _within a declaration_.
For top-level comments: [`moduleLevelComments`](#moduleLevelComments)

values.name: declaration
values.type: { portDocumentationComment : Maybe.Maybe (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String), comments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String) } -> Elm.Syntax.Declaration.Declaration -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: declarationPort
values.type: { documentationComment : Maybe.Maybe (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String), comments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String) } -> Elm.Syntax.Signature.Signature -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: declarations
values.comment:
Print a list of [`Elm.Syntax.Declaration.Declaration`](https://dark.elm.dmy.fr/packages/stil4m/elm-syntax/latest/Elm-Syntax-Declaration#Declaration)s
and comments in between
values.type: { portDocumentationComments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String), comments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String), previousEnd : Elm.Syntax.Range.Location } -> List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node Elm.Syntax.Declaration.Declaration) -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: importExposing
values.comment:
Print the stuff after `exposing` in an import.
For module header exposing: [`moduleExposing`](#moduleExposing)

values.name: moduleExposing
values.comment:
Print the stuff after `exposing` in a module header.
For import exposing: [`importExposing`](#importExposing)
values.type: { atDocsLines : List.List (List.List String.String), comments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String) } -> Elm.Syntax.Node.Node Elm.Syntax.Exposing.Exposing -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: moduleHeader
values.comment:
Print an [`Elm.Syntax.Module.Module`](https://dark.elm.dmy.fr/packages/stil4m/elm-syntax/latest/Elm-Syntax-Module#Module)
(confusingly, that's their name for only the `module X exposing (Y)` lines)
values.type: { atDocsLines : List.List (List.List String.String), comments : List.List (Elm.Syntax.Node.Node String.String) } -> Elm.Syntax.Module.Module -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: moduleLevelComments
values.comment:
Print `--` or `{- -}` comments placed outside of declarations at the top level.
For comments within a declaration: [`comments`](#comments)

values.name: qualifiedReference
values.comment: Print a name with its qualification (`[]` for no qualification)
values.type: { qualification : List.List String.String, unqualified : String.String } -> ElmSyntaxPrint.Print

values.name: toString
values.comment:
All other helpers in this module produce a [`Print`](#Print)
which you can in the end convert to a String with [`toString`](#toString)
